title: steiractinia lucidula
intro: Steiractinia lucidula, also known as the False Unicorn Root, is a perennial plant native to North America, with a rhizome that contains medicinal properties. The plant is used in herbal medicine to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant properties, which help to loosen and clear mucus from the lungs. Steiractinia lucidula is also believed to have anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, providing relief from menstrual cramps, and is considered beneficial for the digestive system and reproductive health. Herbal preparations of Steiractinia lucidula include dried root, tincture, and capsules, which can be used in teas, infusions, or as a supplement to support overall health.
